SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.lang

クラス ObjectSupport

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.lang.ObjectSupport
public final class ObjectSupport extends Object
Static helpers aligned with Objects: almost every method forwards to the JDK so semantics stay identical to the platform. Use this class when you want the same behavior as Objects but prefer a single import namespace alongside StringSupport and friends, or when you need extensions the JDK does not provide.

Extensions beyond Objects

  • firstNonNull(Object...) / lastNonNull(Object...) — pick the first or last non-null from a varargs list
  • toStringElseGet(Object, Supplier) — like Objects.toString(Object, String) but the fallback is supplied lazily
  • requireNonNull(Object, Object...) — validate several references in one call
All other methods are direct forwards; see the linked Objects API for full behavior.

Nullability annotations (Nullable, NonNull) document contracts on signatures; NonNull-annotated reference parameters are validated at runtime with NullPointerException where applicable.

Numeric constraints (NonNegative, Positive) document ranges on signatures; implementations enforce them at runtime with IllegalArgumentException.

関連項目:
  • Objects

    説明

    static <T> int
    compare(T a, T b, @NonNull Comparator<? super T> c)
     
    static boolean
    deepEquals(@Nullable Object a, @Nullable Object b)
    Equality for arrays and nested structures; same as Objects.deepEquals(Object, Object).
    static boolean
    equals(@Nullable Object a, @Nullable Object b)
    Null-safe equality; same result as Objects.equals(Object, Object).
    static <T> T
    firstNonNull(T @Nullable ... values)
    Returns the leftmost non-null argument.
    static int
    hash(Object @Nullable ... values)
     
    static int
    hashCode(@Nullable Object o)
    Hash code for null or delegate; same as Objects.hashCode(Object).
    static boolean
    isNull(@Nullable Object obj)
    true when obj == null; same as Objects.isNull(Object).
    static <T> T
    lastNonNull(T @Nullable ... values)
    Returns the rightmost non-null argument (last index wins among candidates).
    static boolean
    nonNull(@Nullable Object obj)
    true when obj != null; same as Objects.nonNull(Object).
    static void
    requireNonNull(@Nullable Object first, Object @Nullable ... rest)
    Ensures every argument is non-null.
    static <T> T
    requireNonNull(T obj)
    Returns obj or throws; same as Objects.requireNonNull(Object).
    static <T> T
    requireNonNull(T obj, @Nullable String message)
     
    static <T> T
    requireNonNull(T obj, @NonNull Supplier<String> messageSupplier)
     
    static <T> T
    requireNonNullElse(T obj, T defaultObj)
     
    static <T> T
    requireNonNullElseGet(T obj, @NonNull Supplier<? extends T> supplier)
     
    static @NonNull String
    toIdentityString(@NonNull Object o)
     
    static @Nullable String
    toString(@Nullable Object o)
     
    static @Nullable String
    toString(@Nullable Object o, @Nullable String nullDefault)
     
    static @Nullable String
    toStringElseGet(@Nullable Object o, @NonNull Supplier<@Nullable String> defaultSupplier)
    Like Objects.toString(Object, String) but obtains the fallback only when o is null, via defaultSupplier.

    クラスから継承されたメソッド java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • メソッドの詳細

    • equals

      public static boolean equals(@Nullable @Nullable Object a, @Nullable @Nullable Object b)
      Null-safe equality; same result as Objects.equals(Object, Object).
      パラメータ:
      a - first value, may be null
      b - second value, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if both references are null, or if both are non-null and Object.equals would return true
      関連項目:
      • Objects.equals(Object, Object)

    • deepEquals

      public static boolean deepEquals(@Nullable @Nullable Object a, @Nullable @Nullable Object b)
      Equality for arrays and nested structures; same as Objects.deepEquals(Object, Object).
      パラメータ:
      a - first value, may be null
      b - second value, may be null
      戻り値:
      true per deep equality rules of Objects
      関連項目:
      • Objects.deepEquals(Object, Object)

    • hashCode

      public static int hashCode(@Nullable @Nullable Object o)
      Hash code for null or delegate; same as Objects.hashCode(Object).
      パラメータ:
      o - value, may be null
      戻り値:
      0 for null, else o.hashCode()
      関連項目:
      • Objects.hashCode(Object)

    • hash

      public static int hash(Object @Nullable ... values)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.hash(Object...)

    • toString

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String toString(@Nullable @Nullable Object o)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.toString(Object)

    • toString

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String toString(@Nullable @Nullable Object o, @Nullable @Nullable String nullDefault)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.toString(Object, String)

    • toStringElseGet

      @Nullable public static @Nullable String toStringElseGet(@Nullable @Nullable Object o, @NonNull @NonNull Supplier<@Nullable String> defaultSupplier)
      Like Objects.toString(Object, String) but obtains the fallback only when o is null, via defaultSupplier.
      パラメータ:
      defaultSupplier - invoked only when o is null; must not be null
      戻り値:
      o.toString() when o is non-null; otherwise defaultSupplier.get()

    • toIdentityString

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String toIdentityString(@NonNull @NonNull Object o)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.toIdentityString(Object)

    • compare

      public static <T> int compare(@Nullable T a, @Nullable T b, @NonNull @NonNull Comparator<? super T> c)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.compare(Object, Object, Comparator)

    • requireNonNull

      @NonNull public static <T> T requireNonNull(@Nullable T obj)
      Returns obj or throws; same as Objects.requireNonNull(Object).
      型パラメータ:
      T - value type
      パラメータ:
      obj - reference that must not be null
      戻り値:
      obj
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if obj is null
      関連項目:
      • Objects.requireNonNull(Object)

    • requireNonNull

      @NonNull public static <T> T requireNonNull(@Nullable T obj, @Nullable @Nullable String message)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.requireNonNull(Object, String)

    • requireNonNull

      @NonNull public static <T> T requireNonNull(@Nullable T obj, @NonNull @NonNull Supplier<String> messageSupplier)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.requireNonNull(Object, Supplier)

    • requireNonNull

      public static void requireNonNull(@Nullable @Nullable Object first, Object @Nullable ... rest)
      Ensures every argument is non-null. Equivalent to invoking Objects.requireNonNull(Object) on first and each element of rest.

      Prefer passing extra references as separate arguments (requireNonNull(a, b, c)) rather than a single null-filled array (requireNonNull(a, new Object[] {null})), except when testing. A bare null as the second argument is ambiguous with requireNonNull(Object, String): requireNonNull(x, (String) null) resolves to the message overload, which does not throw when x is non-null.

      例外:
      NullPointerException - if first, the rest array itself, or any element of rest is null

    • firstNonNull

      @SafeVarargs @Nullable public static <T> T firstNonNull(T @Nullable ... values)
      Returns the leftmost non-null argument.
      パラメータ:
      values - references scanned from index 0 upward; a null varargs array yields null
      戻り値:
      the first non-null value, or null if every argument is null

    • lastNonNull

      @SafeVarargs @Nullable public static <T> T lastNonNull(T @Nullable ... values)
      Returns the rightmost non-null argument (last index wins among candidates).
      パラメータ:
      values - scanned from the last index downward; a null varargs array yields null
      戻り値:
      that non-null value, or null if every argument is null

    • isNull

      public static boolean isNull(@Nullable @Nullable Object obj)
      true when obj == null; same as Objects.isNull(Object).
      パラメータ:
      obj - reference to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if obj is null
      関連項目:
      • Objects.isNull(Object)

    • nonNull

      public static boolean nonNull(@Nullable @Nullable Object obj)
      true when obj != null; same as Objects.nonNull(Object).
      パラメータ:
      obj - reference to test, may be null
      戻り値:
      true if obj is not null
      関連項目:
      • Objects.nonNull(Object)

    • requireNonNullElse

      @NonNull public static <T> T requireNonNullElse(@Nullable T obj, @Nullable T defaultObj)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.requireNonNullElse(Object, Object)

    • requireNonNullElseGet

      @NonNull public static <T> T requireNonNullElseGet(@Nullable T obj, @NonNull @NonNull Supplier<? extends T> supplier)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.requireNonNullElseGet(Object, Supplier)

    • checkIndex

      public static int checkIndex(int index, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int length)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.checkIndex(int, int)

    • checkFromToIndex

      public static int checkFromToIndex(int fromIndex, int toIndex, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int length)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.checkFromToIndex(int, int, int)

    • checkFromIndexSize

      public static int checkFromIndexSize(int fromIndex, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int size, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative int length)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.checkFromIndexSize(int, int, int)

    • checkIndex

      public static long checkIndex(long index, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative long length)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.checkIndex(long, long)

    • checkFromToIndex

      public static long checkFromToIndex(long fromIndex, long toIndex, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative long length)
      関連項目:
      • Objects.checkFromToIndex(long, long, long)

    • checkFromIndexSize

      public static long checkFromIndexSize(long fromIndex, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative long size, @NonNegative @org.commonutils.annotation.NonNegative long length)
      関連項目:
